title: Lepro GU10 LED Bulbs Dimmable, Warm White 2700K, 4.5W 345lm, 50W Halogen Spotlight Bulb Equivalent, 38° Narrow Beam, Energy Saving GU10 LED Light Bulbs, Pack of 10
features: [Dimmable GU10 LED Bulbs] Smooth dimming from 10%-100%, the led bulb is compatible with most electronic LED dimmer switches, not compatible with 3-way touch control lamps and halogen dimmers.

[Energy Saving GU10 Bulbs] Replace 50W old GU10 halogen bulb with 4.5W LED GU10 bulb, saving 91% on electricity bill, and the long lifespan (up to 15,000 hours) will lower your ongoing maintenance costs by reducing re-lamp frequency.

[Nice Warm White Dimmable] High quality GU10 LED gives off 345 lumen flicker-free 2700k warm light for pleasant atmosphere. High colour rendering (CRI > 80) provides vivid and true colour and Beam angle of 38 degrees for a focused bright beam.

[Easy Installation & Environment Friendly] Standard PAR16 shape with GU10 lock base, compatible with all standard GU10 light holders. No mercury, no ultraviolet or infrared light, safe for your family and the environment.

[Wide Application Light Bulbs] These gu10 led bulbs warm white dimmable are ideal for kitchen, living room, bedroom, office, restaurant, hotel, coffee shop, ceiling light fitting, wall or ceiling spotlights, track light, recessed down-light, etc.
description: Product Description WARM TIPS: 4 Things to Know before Buying 1. This dimmable GU10 LED bulb is not compatible with 3-level touch control lamps . Flickering will happen due to different working mechanism. It is not a quality issue of the bulb or the touch lamp. 2. The gu10 led bulbs only compatible with most of the LED dimmers , not compatible with halogen dimmers . Please make sure your dimmer switch is compatible with LED bulbs. 3. As there are thousands of dimmer brands in the market, the compatibility is inconsistent. It might be possible that our bulb flickers on the highest or lowest setting when fitted into some LED dimmers. But that is not a quality issue. We suggest you to adjust the bulb in a proper range. 4. It might be possible that our bulb flickers when only 1 bulb fitted into the LED dimmers. But that is not a quality issue. You can try to connect multiple bulbs to one LED dimmer, which may improve compatibility. Lepro Dimmable GU10 LED Spot Light Bulbs Perfect Halogen Replacement With GU10 bi-pin base, similar shape and size design, these GU10 LED bulbs are ideal and long-lasting replacements for your mains voltage halogen lamps, they can be easily fitted to your existing light fixtures with GU10 holders. Safe for Your Family It contains no lead or mercury, no hazardous emissions, no UV or IR radiation, shockproof and vibration proof, very safe for your home and family. High CRI CRI over 80, which tends to make objects reflecting colours truly and vividly. Specifications 4.5W = 50W, 345 lumen 220-240V AC Warm White 2700K 38° Beam Angle Dimmable Plastic ø50mm x 53mm Pack of 10 Units Key Features Significant Energy Savings 4.5W LED equivalent to 50W halogen, save 91% energy. They can also last up to 15,000h, which will reduce re-lamp frequency and cost. 38° Focused Beam Perfect for both accent lighting and general-purpose lighting, and ideal for use in kitchens, kitchen island lighting, living rooms and dining rooms. Easy Installation Standard GU10 Base. Twist & lock, install them in seconds.
